content: Rose: Fuck. Still smells like rotten flesh and spilled cum in this shithole. Movarth really let his pets run wild before we gutted him, huh? Vampire’s Vampire's Thrall: Oh, this? Barely a scratch. Though I wouldn’t mind if one of those leech-fuckers had bitten lower. Been too long since I had something besides my own fingers in my cunt. Rose: Disgusting. You thralls really are all the same—fucking anything with a pulse. Or without one, apparently. Vampire’s Vampire's Thrall: Like you’re one to talk, Rose. Saw you mounting that bandit chief’s corpse back near Windhelm. Made him squeal before he stopped breathing. Rose: He begged for it. Weak men taste sweeter when they scream. But at least I don’t fuck corpses that’ve been dead for centuries. Your master’s cock must’ve been colder than a Frost Troll’s balls. Vampire’s Vampire's Thrall: A hole’s a hole. And Movarth knew how to use his teeth. Still throbbing where he fed. You ever let a vamp take you? Nothing like coming while they drain you dry. Rose: I’d rather ride a spiked club bareback. But speaking of cold cocks— —you think the Dawnguard’s really wiping out the rest of these bloodsuckers? Fucking prudes. Ruining everyone’s fun. Vampire’s Vampire's Thrall: Oh, they’ll try. But Dibella’s faithful always find a way. Even those armored pricks will give in eventually. Saw one of their recruits jerking off outside a cave full of Falmer last week. Poor bastard didn’t last long after they smelled his seed. Rose: Good. World’s more fun when the pious get their throats torn open mid-prayer.

Rose: Hah. Ain’t that the truth. Nothing like watching some holy bitch choke on her own devotion. Vampire's Thrall: Damn right. Speaking of choking—you hear about that orc chief near Markarth? Rumor says he’s got a taste for priestesses. Ties them up with their own temple silks before putting ‘em to use. Rose: Sounds like my kind of party. Maybe we should swing by after we loot this cesspool dry. Vampire's Thrall: Fuck yeah. Long as I get first ride on whatever’s left of the pious cunt when he’s done.
